calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-22-2019 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-18-2018 Set For Trial On Apr-15-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint; [Proposed] First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-18-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF JORGE RIVERO'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Mr. Rivero may file his first amended complaint no later than April 25, 2018. It will not be deemed filed.

ORDER SIGNED.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, email: cjordan@sftc.org.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2018 Continued To Jun-06-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
